name: Spinach Mushroom Frittata
servings: serves 4 ǀ prep. time 10 minutes ǀ cooking time 15 minutes

ingredients.item: yellow potatoes, peeled and sliced thinly

method: In a large non-stick skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the spinach, onion, and potatoes. Cook for 5 minutes.
In a medium mixing bowl, whisk the eggs with the feta cheese, salt, and pepper.
Lower the temperature to medium-low heat. Pour the egg mixture on top of the ingredients in the skillet. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
Flip the frittata and cook for 2-3 minutes more.
